---
title: "Outbreak Investigation and Vaccine Effectiveness"
subtitle: "PH_DEMO_01"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO"
toc: True
---

Demonstration course showing Word-first structured publishing with public health content.

## Sessions


- [SE01: Foundations of Outbreak Investigation](se01/index.qmd) 

- [SE02: Interpretation and Communication](se02/index.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="se01/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Foundations of Outbreak Investigation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
